name: Digestive Balance Complex™
tagline: Aromatic seed extracts + standardized ginger to support digestive comfort and balance.
supports: Supports occasional bloating and gas relief (structure/function)
facts: Ginger root extract (Zingiber officinale) 5% gingerols — 150 mg
Black pepper extract (Piper nigrum) 95% piperine — 5 mg
Other ingredients: vegetable cellulose capsule, microcrystalline cellulose

name: Balanced Vitality Complex™
tagline: Botanicals traditionally used to support calm focus, emotional steadiness, and stress resilience.
supports: Supports calm focus and emotional balance
facts: Rose extract (Rosa spp., preferably Rosa damascena) — 150 mg
Other ingredients: vegetable cellulose capsule, microcrystalline cellulose

name: Urinary Flow Support™
tagline: A forthcoming formula designed for everyday urinary comfort and hydration-aligned routine support.
facts: Formula in development — final ingredient list pending
